Suppose in one transaction I am doing insertion in Table1, then in Table2 and then in Table3. Operations in Table1 and 2 suceeded. But operation in Table3 failed. Now I want that the insertions done in Table1 and 2 will not be rolled back. How would I achieve that using @Transactional annotation?
